message:
fix: code review bug fixes across CASS, scanner, DCG, and UBS

CASS client:
- Fix timeout memory leak in createBunCommandRunner (clearTimeout on success/error)
- Fix path extraction in routes to use c.req.param("*") for Hono wildcards

Context service:
- Fix duplicate token counting by storing result in variable

Scanner routes:
- Fix hasMore pagination by requesting limit+1 to check for more results
- Add null check after dismissFinding for defensive handling

DCG RU integration:
- Fix backwards validation logic (blockedCommands > 0 = invalid, not valid)

UBS service:
- Add paths tracking to ScanResult for scan history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -357,11 +357,14 @@ export async function validateSweepPlan(
   const valid = blockedCommands === 0;
 
   // Update plan with validation results
+  // Logic: blocked commands = invalid, only warnings = warning, neither = valid
+  const validationResult = blockedCommands > 0 ? "invalid" : warnings > 0 ? "warning" : "valid";
+
   await db
     .update(agentSweepPlans)
     .set({
       validatedAt: new Date(),
-      validationResult: valid ? "valid" : warnings > 0 ? "warning" : "invalid",
+      validationResult,
       validationErrors: findings.length > 0 ? JSON.stringify(findings) : null,
       riskLevel,
       updatedAt: new Date(),
